flags.label: Public certificate-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Blackhawk Technical College are 7% below the public certificate-predominant peer median ($41.6k vs $44.6k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Blackhawk Technical College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Blackhawk Technical College rose 45% between 2006 and 2009 (28.5% → 41.2%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Blackhawk Technical College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2k → 2.5k).
